MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS FCI CONSTRUCTORS, INC. and FCI CONSTRUCTORS, INC./BALFOUR BEATTY, A JOINT VENTURE'S Motion To Change Venue (To San Diego County).
APPEARANCE: Michelle Soltani Simmons, Esq. of Donahue Gallagher Woods 510/451-0544 for pltf & opposing party; Jeffrey S. Conner, Esq. of Ernest Brown & Company 646-8940 for defts & moving parties.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DENIED. 1)ALLEGED BREACH IS DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO PAY IN SAN FRANCISCO. 2)FAILS TO SHOW PRINCIPLE PLACE OF BUSINESS. Order signed in open court. (302/REQ/KD) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Reporter: Ann Mendoza, CSR #6812
